node.text:
🎥🎬: The Stare That Spoke Volumes

In a chilling courtroom moment, Ted Bundy sits in silence, his gaze fixed as his only surviving victim, Carol DaRonch, takes the stand to testify against him.

As she recounts the terrifying encounter and her narrow escape, the tension in the room becomes almost unbearable. Bundy’s stare is cold, controlled, and unsettling—revealing nothing, yet saying everything about the darkness behind his calm exterior.

For DaRonch, facing him again is an act of immense courage, turning survival into justice. Her voice stands in contrast to his silence, breaking through the fear that once defined their encounter.

It’s a haunting moment where victim and predator meet again—this time, with the truth on record and the power finally shifting.

#TrueCrime #TedBundy #Courtroom #Justice #Chilling
That’s her checkmate smile. She was about to get her revenge.
You women really are lost aren't you 😂
No that’s her smile that i will still spread em for you
No that’s the fantasy smile. Female psyche is complicated
She was the one who got away and the one who got him convicted.

@mpatmack actually I watched a documentary on Bundy and his trial. Bundy’s lawyer made her testimony look like she wasn’t really sure. Bundy was largely convicted because his bite marks were found on one victim and they matched them to his teeth in court
@mpatmack her @?
@mpatmack takes just one thanks God
He is trying to intimidate her with those eyes and she is laughing!!!!
@carmenrororo She first matches his menacing stare, and then feels a wave of satisfaction realizing that she's the one responsible for what awaits him
@carmenrororo ...yeaaaah sure
@carmenrororo erm
She is not flirting . She has power back. As if to say got ya.
@roberta.kane.140
@mankcy3732 correction child sorry
Anyone saying she’s flirting is one step away from being Ted Bundy
@tamihansen and they keep roofies on them “just in case”
@tamihansen damn.. well if the shoe fits 😢
She saved so many lives by surviving and being able to testify.
To this day you can see them claiming to be Feminists and the reason they say they wanted his autograph was because he was stunning. I'm like what? 😂
@abin6007 So gross!!
I agree
This is why you can’t ever be nice to men. They always think you’re flirting even when you’re not.
Seriously! And I work in customer service and it’s like - man this is my job, to be nice to everyone! It’s not an invitation to flirt, and ffs why do you think it’s ok to TOUCH me!
@iamcorrectlilbro "ohh she's smiling at me she's flirting towards me! She have crush on me!" dudeeee get a grip, just how lonely enough u are?😂😂
He’s so pissed off she got away. Look at his face he’s furious.
@n1ck_sp and she wanted to fix him
@n1ck_sp exactly
@n1ck_sp exactly
All the men in these comments saying she is flirting is why I don’t trust men.
@neurodiggitydog Her* face...
@neurodiggitydog well it is edited to appear that way.
The “I got you” face. For all the women who didn’t make it.
The amount of men in the comments who are incapable of reading a woman’s body language 🫠
@keith.miller_ preach what 😂 absolute idiocy
@b1tch__puddin people have lost the plot. You can literally feel the anger and disgust coming off of her that’s directed at him. How anyone can interpret that are being flirty 😂😵‍💫
@rosadefontaine_ 😂😂😂 be quite wicked witch of the west
She looks so proud 👏 and might I say, her hair is AMAZING
@daylightlazuli yes. she looks hot 🔥 im sure Ted was thinking the same ❤️
@daylightlazuli say what you want about Ted but he did have good taste
@le_bel_olibrius 🤦‍♀️😂
Smiling back is a power move! She’s overpowered him twice - first getting away and second in court
She was the chosen one.
How did she get away?!
@decorlove11 she basically fought him off and ran to the nearest person for help
Some people actually think that she is flirting. Seriously. All I see is a woman showing her power and saying I'm not scared of you anymore and I'm going to destroy you.
@debbie_s_j33 you can’t read minds. So seriously it sounds hypocritical now that you are stating that 😂
@debbie_s_j33 If anyone thinks that she is flirting is a sick misogynist son
@debbie_s_j33 😂😂😂😂😂
Wasn’t there several other surviving victims?

@thematthewscooby Yes, there were other survivors. That post is misleading. Carol DaRonch was not Bundy’s only survivor. She’s often singled out because she was an early surviving victim who escaped, identified him, and gave especially important testimony in the Utah kidnapping case.
I like how he looked o m g
I know doesnt change he has sexy eyes
She has the power now
Exactly
She's thinking "I'm special to him, he didn't kill me"
@cannnib4lc0rpse he would have got you too, you ain't no daisy.
@amazia_dan pfft. You good at picking bad men 2 huh.
Ok bot
He’s got good taste she’s beautiful
@anthony164027 she was a teen here...but alright. Truly have bundys taste i guess
@branjamesleon yeah there's a time and place for everything
@lilswrldd Give it rest. What he said was not offensive and should not be construed as such. She is beautiful and Bundy was known for having a type.
You know he's fuming inside!  Well done to the lady for not being intimidated 🔥
So brave of her

When you really watch there is so much meaning to what she’s doing .. she stares him down proving she isn’t afraid of him , the smile is screw you and the look away is she is dismissing him and all of that is driving him insane .. love her power
@mccoll.anne YES!!!! ❤️
“She’s flirting” 🙄🤦🏻‍♀️ and this is why girls don’t smile back
He's trying to intimidate her, but failed.
Look at his face... He wants to 💀 her right there in the courtroom. He knows hes cooked.
